
01a.)a.) C1,6 (1010(2)) = 110101 (2)

C1 = 001010 -> 110101

b.) C1,8 (1001(2)) = 11110110(2)

00001001 -> 11110110

c.) C2,6 (101001(2)) = 010111(2)

010110+1 = 010111

d.) C2,7 (101011(2)) = 1010101(2)

0101011 -> 1010100 + 1 = 1010101

e.) C2,8 (111010(2)) = 11000110(2)

00111010 -> 11000101 + 1 = 11000110


02a.)a.) C1,6 (213(4)) = 011000(2)
213(4) = 100111(2) -> C1 011000(2)

B.) C1,8 (D6(16)) = 00101001(2)
D6(16) = 11010110(2) -> C1 00101001(2)

C.) C2,6 (312(4)) = 001010(2)
312(4) = 110110(2) -> C1 001001(2) + 1 = C2 001010(2)

D.) C2,10 (157(8)) = 1110010001(2)
157(8) =  001101111(2) -> 0001101111(2) -> C1 1110010000(2) + 1 = C2 1110010001(2)

E.) C2,8 (8E(16)) = 01110010(2)
8e(16) = 10001110(2) -> C1 01110001(2) + 1 = C2 01110010(2)



03a.)a.) 10111(2) = 9(10)
10111 - 1 = 10110 -> 01001(2) = 9(10)

b.) 110101(2) = 11(10)
110101 - 1 = 110100 = 001011(2) = 11(10)

c.) 100100(2) = 011100(2)
100100 - 1 = 100011 -> 011100

d.) 1011011(2) = 0100101(2)
1011011 - 1 = 1011010 ->  0100101

e.) 1111101(2) = 3(16)
1111101 - 1 = 1111100 -> 0000011(2) = 3(16)

04a.)a.) 11011(2) - 1101(2) = 01110(2)
 011011 - C2(001101) -> 110010 + 1 = 110011

011011
110011 +
------
(1)0 01110

b.) 101,1001(2) - 10,11(2) = 10,1101(2)
0 101,1001 - C2(0 010,1100) -> 1 101,0011 + 1 = 1 101,0100

0 101,1001
1 101,0100 +
-----------
(1)0 010,1101

c.) 312(4) - 123(4) = 123(4)
 0 110110(2) - C2(0 011011(2)) -> 1 100100 + 1 = 1 100101

0 110110
1 100101 +
--------
(1)0 011011


d.) 754(8) - 367(8) = 365(8)
 0 111101100(2) - C2(0 011110111(2)) -> 1 100001000 + 1 = 1 100001001

0 111101100
1 100001001 +
-----------
(1)0 011110101
